name: Peet Limited
analysis: PPC has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 17% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.7900, stop A$1.5939, target A$1.9850 (0.99:1) — then trail it.
